values.name: FLAG_CONVERT_COLORS
values.summary: If set, a predefined color map is applied to the image. Used when [member ResourceImporterTexture.editor/convert_colors_with_editor_theme] is [code]true[/code].

values.name: FLAG_FORCE_LINEAR
values.summary: If set, the image is converted from sRGB to linear encoding.

values.name: FLAG_NONE
values.summary: Default loading behavior. No processing is applied to the image.

constants.name: FLAG_NONE
constants.summary: Default loading behavior. No processing is applied to the image.

constants.name: FLAG_FORCE_LINEAR
constants.summary: If set, the image is converted from sRGB to linear encoding.

constants.name: FLAG_CONVERT_COLORS
constants.summary: If set, a predefined color map is applied to the image. Used when [member ResourceImporterTexture.editor/convert_colors_with_editor_theme] is [code]true[/code].
